cv_text:
Debanjan Mazumdar
Product Manager | Paris, France
dmazumdar186@gmail.com

SUMMARY
AI-focused Product Manager with 15 years of experience building data-driven products across B2B SaaS and marketplace businesses. Fluent in English and French. Proven track record of 0-to-1 launches, cross-functional leadership, and hands-on prototyping.

EXPERIENCE

Senior Product Manager — DataCo, Paris (2021–present)
- Led AI personalization engine that increased conversion by 23%.
- Defined roadmap for real-time analytics dashboard; coordinated 8-engineer squad.
- Shipped 3 major releases on schedule across two calendar years.

Product Manager — SaaSCorp, Paris (2018–2021)
- Owned B2B onboarding funnel: reduced time-to-value from 14 days to 4 days.
- Launched self-serve pricing tier; grew SMB revenue by 40% in 12 months.
- Partnered with sales to develop competitive positioning framework.

Product Analyst — StartupXYZ, London (2015–2018)
- Built dashboards for retention metrics; surfaced churn signals adopted by CS team.
- Defined KPIs for mobile app v2 launch (iOS + Android).

EDUCATION
MSc Computer Science — Imperial College London (2014)
BSc Engineering — IIT Kharagpur (2012)

SKILLS
Product strategy, roadmap planning, A/B testing, SQL, Python, Figma, Jira, Mixpanel, AI/LLM integration, agile/scrum, stakeholder management, bilingual (EN/FR)
jd_text:
Senior Product Manager — AI Platform
OpenAI, San Francisco (Remote-friendly)

About the role:
We are looking for a Senior PM to drive the roadmap for our developer platform. You will define the strategy for API products used by millions of developers worldwide. You will partner closely with engineering, design, and GTM to ship high-impact features.

What we need:
- 8+ years of product management experience, preferably in AI, developer tools, or platform products.
- Strong technical depth: comfortable reading code, understanding APIs, and speaking credibly with engineers.
- Experience with 0-to-1 product launches at scale.
- Excellent written and verbal communication; ability to influence without authority.
- Experience working cross-functionally in a fast-paced environment.
- Bonus: experience building products used by external developers; familiarity with LLMs.

What you will do:
- Define and own the multi-year roadmap for the OpenAI API platform.
- Work with engineering to ship reliable, scalable developer-facing features.
- Gather signal from developers, synthesize into product decisions.
- Write crisp PRDs, specs, and strategy documents.
- Track key metrics: API adoption, latency, error rates, developer NPS.
